mapper.select: SELECT * FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND house_id = #{houseId}
SELECT * FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorites (user_id, house_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{houseId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND house_id = #{houseId}
